title: Deliverable D-JRP19-WP4.8  Report on the development of Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for the post DNA extraction capture of Cryptosporidium spp. DNA
author: Karin Troell
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a deliverable of the OHEJP project: PARADISE, and deals with the development of Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for the post-DNA extraction capture of  Cryptosporidium  spp. DNA.
steps_raw: This is a deliverable of the OHEJP project: PARADISE, and deals with the development of Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for the post-DNA extraction capture of  Cryptosporidium  spp. DNA.
